name: Miniclaw Human
description: Interactive human-in-the-loop via noVNC session delivered over Telegram. AM calls 'mc-human ask <reason>' to hand control to Michael for captchas, login flows, or any UI AM cannot automate.

tgBotToken.description: Telegram bot token (falls back to channels.telegram.botToken)

tgChatId.description: Telegram chat ID to send URLs to (falls back to first allowFrom)
